API compatibility report for the libyang.so object between 4.2.2 and 5.0.0 versions on x86_64


Binary
Compatibility Source
Compatibility

Test Info

Module Namelibyang.so
Version #14.2.2
Version #25.0.0
Archx86_64
GCC Version15.2.1

Total Header Files18
Total Source Files29
Total Objects1
Total Symbols / Types369 / 194

Added Symbols  4 

log.h, libyang.so.5.0.0
ly_temp_log_clb ( ly_log_clb clb )

parser_data.h, libyang.so.5.0.0
lyd_parse_value_fragment ( struct ly_ctx const* ctx, char const* path, struct ly_in* in, enum LYD_FORMAT format, uint32_t new_val_options, uint32_t parse_options, uint32_t validate_options, struct lyd_node** tree )

tree_data.h, libyang.so.5.0.0
ly_pattern_free ( void* pat_comp )

tree_schema.h, libyang.so.5.0.0
lys_find_module ( struct ly_ctx const* ctx, struct lysc_node const* ctx_node, char const* prefix, uint32_t prefix_len, enum LY_VALUE_FORMAT format, void const* prefix_data )

Removed Symbols  10 

parser_data.h, libyang.so.4.2.2
lyd_parse_ext_data ( struct lysc_ext_instance const* ext, struct lyd_node* parent, struct ly_in* in, enum LYD_FORMAT format, uint32_t parse_options, uint32_t validate_options, struct lyd_node** tree )
lyd_parse_ext_op ( struct lysc_ext_instance const* ext, struct lyd_node* parent, struct ly_in* in, enum LYD_FORMAT format, enum lyd_type data_type, uint32_t parse_options, struct lyd_node** tree, struct lyd_node** op )

plugins_exts.h, libyang.so.4.2.2
lyplg_ext_insert ( struct lyd_node* parent, struct lyd_node* first )

plugins_types.h, libyang.so.4.2.2
lyplg_type_identity_module ( struct ly_ctx const* ctx, struct lysc_node const* ctx_node, char const* prefix, uint32_t prefix_len, enum LY_VALUE_FORMAT format, void const* prefix_data )

tree_data.h, libyang.so.4.2.2
lyd_new_ext_any ( struct lysc_ext_instance const* ext, char const* name, void const* value, enum LYD_ANYDATA_VALUETYPE value_type, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** node )
lyd_new_ext_inner ( struct lysc_ext_instance const* ext, char const* name, struct lyd_node** node )
lyd_new_ext_list ( struct lysc_ext_instance const* ext, char const* name, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** node, ... )
lyd_new_ext_path ( struct lyd_node* parent, struct lysc_ext_instance const* ext, char const* path, char const* value, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** node )
lyd_new_ext_term ( struct lysc_ext_instance const* ext, char const* name, void const* value, uint32_t value_size_bits, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** node )

tree_schema.h, libyang.so.4.2.2
lys_getnext_ext ( struct lysc_node const* last, struct lysc_node const* parent, struct lysc_ext_instance const* ext, uint32_t options )

to the top

Problems with Symbols, High Severity  26 

context.h, libyang.so.4.2.2
[+] ly_ctx_new ( char const* search_dir, uint32_t options, struct ly_ctx** new_ctx )  1 
Change Effect
1 The parameter new_ctx became passed in r14 register instead of r15. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.

[+] ly_ctx_unset_searchdir ( struct ly_ctx* ctx, char const* value )  2 
Change Effect
1 The parameter ctx became passed in rbx register instead of rbp. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.
2 The parameter value became passed in rbp register instead of r13. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.


parser_data.h, libyang.so.4.2.2
[+] lyd_parse_data ( struct ly_ctx const* ctx, struct lyd_node* parent, struct ly_in* in, enum LYD_FORMAT format, uint32_t parse_options, uint32_t validate_options, struct lyd_node** tree )  1 
Change Effect
1 The parameter in became passed in rax register instead of rdx. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.

[+] lyd_validate_ext ( struct lyd_node** ext_tree, struct lysc_ext_instance const* ext, uint32_t val_opts, struct lyd_node const* dep_tree, struct lyd_node** diff )  1 
⇣
lyd_validate_ext ( struct lyd_node** subtree, struct lysc_ext_instance const* ext, uint32_t val_opts, struct lyd_node** diff )
Change Effect
1 4th middle parameter dep_tree has been removed from the calling stack. Layout of parameter's stack has been changed and therefore parameters at higher positions in the stack may be incorrectly initialized by applications.

[+] lyd_validate_op ( struct lyd_node* op_tree, struct lyd_node const* dep_tree, enum lyd_type data_type, struct lyd_node** diff )  1 
Change Effect
1 The parameter op_tree became passed in r13 register instead of r12. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.


plugins_types.h, libyang.so.4.2.2
[+] lyplg_type_lypath_new ( struct ly_ctx const* ctx, char const* value, uint32_t value_len, uint32_t options, enum LY_VALUE_FORMAT format, void* prefix_data, struct lysc_node const* ctx_node, struct lysc_ext_instance const* top_ext, struct lys_glob_unres* unres, struct ly_path** path, struct ly_err_item** err )  1 
⇣
lyplg_type_lypath_new ( struct ly_ctx const* ctx, char const* value, uint32_t value_len, uint32_t options, enum LY_VALUE_FORMAT format, void* prefix_data, struct lysc_node const* ctx_node, struct lys_glob_unres* unres, struct ly_path** path, struct ly_err_item** err )
Change Effect
1 8th middle parameter top_ext has been removed from the calling stack. Layout of parameter's stack has been changed and therefore parameters at higher positions in the stack may be incorrectly initialized by applications.

[+] lyplg_type_resolve_leafref ( struct lysc_type_leafref const* lref, struct lyd_node const* node, struct lyd_value* value, struct lyd_node const* tree, struct lysc_ext_instance const* top_ext, struct ly_set** targets, char** errmsg )  1 
⇣
lyplg_type_resolve_leafref ( struct lysc_type_leafref const* lref, struct lyd_node const* node, struct lyd_value* value, struct lyd_node const* tree, struct ly_set** targets, char** errmsg )
Change Effect
1 5th middle parameter top_ext has been removed from the calling stack. Layout of parameter's stack has been changed and therefore parameters at higher positions in the stack may be incorrectly initialized by applications.

[+] lyplg_type_store_string ( struct ly_ctx const* ctx, struct lysc_type const* type, void const* value, uint32_t value_size_bits, uint32_t options, enum LY_VALUE_FORMAT format, void* UNUSED_prefix_data, uint32_t hints, struct lysc_node const* UNUSED_ctx_node, struct lysc_ext_instance const* UNUSED_top_ext, struct lyd_value* storage, struct lys_glob_unres* UNUSED_unres, struct ly_err_item** err )  1 
⇣
lyplg_type_store_string ( struct ly_ctx const* ctx, struct lysc_type const* type, void const* value, uint32_t value_size_bits, uint32_t options, enum LY_VALUE_FORMAT format, void* UNUSED_prefix_data, uint32_t hints, struct lysc_node const* UNUSED_ctx_node, struct lyd_value* storage, struct lys_glob_unres* UNUSED_unres, struct ly_err_item** err )
Change Effect
1 10th middle parameter UNUSED_top_ext has been removed from the calling stack. Layout of parameter's stack has been changed and therefore parameters at higher positions in the stack may be incorrectly initialized by applications.


tree_data.h, libyang.so.4.2.2
[+] ly_pattern_match ( struct ly_ctx const* ctx, char const* pattern, char const* string, uint32_t str_len, pcre2_code_8** pcode )  2 
Change Effect
1 The parameter str_len became passed in rbp register instead of r14. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.
2 The parameter string became passed in r13 register instead of r12. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.

[+] lyd_any_value_str ( struct lyd_node const* any, char** value_str )  1 
Change Effect
1 The parameter value_str became passed in rbp register instead of rsi. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.

[+] lyd_find_sibling_val ( struct lyd_node const* siblings, struct lysc_node const* schema, char const* key_or_value, uint32_t val_len, struct lyd_node** match )  1 
Change Effect
1 The parameter val_len became passed in rcx register instead of r14. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.

[+] lyd_insert_child ( struct lyd_node* parent, struct lyd_node* node )  1 
Change Effect
1 The parameter parent became passed in rbp register instead of r12. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.

[+] lyd_new_any ( struct lyd_node* parent, struct lys_module const* module, char const* name, void const* value, enum LYD_ANYDATA_VALUETYPE value_type, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** node )  1 
Change Effect
1 The parameter module became passed in rbp register instead of r12. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.

[+] lyd_new_list2 ( struct lyd_node* parent, struct lys_module const* module, char const* name, char const* keys, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** node )  2 
Change Effect
1 The parameter keys became passed in rbp register instead of r13. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.
2 The parameter module became passed in rax register instead of r12. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.

[+] lyd_new_list3 ( struct lyd_node* parent, struct lys_module const* module, char const* name, void const** key_values, uint32_t* value_sizes_bits, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** node )  1 
Change Effect
1 The parameter parent became passed in r12 register instead of r13. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.

[+] lyd_new_path ( struct lyd_node* parent, struct ly_ctx const* ctx, char const* path, char const* value, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** node )  2 
Change Effect
1 The parameter node became passed in r9 register instead of r15. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.
2 The parameter options became passed in r13 register instead of r8. Applications will read the wrong memory block instead of the parameter value.


tree_schema.h, libyang.so.4.2.2
[+] lys_find_child ( struct lysc_node const* parent, struct lys_module const* module, char const* name, size_t name_len, uint16_t nodetype, uint32_t options )  6 
⇣
lys_find_child ( struct ly_ctx const* ctx, struct lysc_node const* parent, struct lys_module const* mod, char const* mod_name, uint32_t mod_len, char const* name, uint32_t name_len, uint32_t options )
Change Effect
1 Parameter ctx of type struct ly_ctx const* has been added to the calling stack at the middle position. Layout of parameter's stack has been changed and therefore parameters at higher positions in the stack may be incorrectly initialized by applications.
2 Parameter mod of type struct lys_module const* has been added to the calling stack at the middle position. Layout of parameter's stack has been changed and therefore parameters at higher positions in the stack may be incorrectly initialized by applications.
3 Parameter mod_name of type char const* has been added to the calling stack at the middle position. Layout of parameter's stack has been changed and therefore parameters at higher positions in the stack may be incorrectly initialized by applications.
4 Parameter mod_len of type uint32_t has been added to the calling stack at the middle position. Layout of parameter's stack has been changed and therefore parameters at higher positions in the stack may be incorrectly initialized by applications.
5 2nd middle parameter module has been removed from the calling stack. Layout of parameter's stack has been changed and therefore parameters at higher positions in the stack may be incorrectly initialized by applications.
6 5th middle parameter nodetype has been removed from the calling stack. Layout of parameter's stack has been changed and therefore parameters at higher positions in the stack may be incorrectly initialized by applications.


to the top

Problems with Data Types, Medium Severity  3 

plugins_exts.h
[+] struct lyplg_ext  1 
Change Effect
1 Field snode_xpath has been added at the middle position of this structural type. 1) Size of the inclusive type has been changed.
2) Layout of structure fields has been changed and therefore fields at higher positions of the structure definition may be incorrectly accessed by applications.
[+] affected symbols: 2 (0.5%)
lyplg_add_extension_plugin ( struct ly_ctx* ctx, uint32_t version, struct lyplg_ext_record const* recs )
Field 'recs.plugin' in 3rd parameter 'recs' (pointer) is of type 'struct lyplg_ext'.
lysc_get_ext_plugin ( uintptr_t plugin_ref )
Return value (pointer) has base type 'struct lyplg_ext'.


[+] struct lyplg_ext_record  1 
Change Effect
1 Size of field plugin has been changed from 104 bytes to 112 bytes. 1) Size of the inclusive type has been changed.
2) Previous accesses of applications and library functions to this field may be broken.
[+] affected symbols: 1 (0.3%)
lyplg_add_extension_plugin ( struct ly_ctx* ctx, uint32_t version, struct lyplg_ext_record const* recs )
3rd parameter 'recs' (pointer) has base type 'struct lyplg_ext_record'.



tree_data.h
[+] struct lyd_value_union  1 
Change Effect
1 Field top_ext has been removed from this type. 1) Applications will access incorrect memory when attempting to access this field.
2) Size of the inclusive type has been changed.

Problems with Symbols, Medium Severity  6 

log.h, libyang.so.4.2.2
[+] ly_err_print ( struct ly_ctx const* ctx, struct ly_err_item const* eitem )  2 
⇣
ly_err_print ( struct ly_ctx const* ctx, struct ly_err_item const* eitem, struct lyd_node const* lnode, struct lysc_node const* snode )
Change Effect
1 Parameter lnode of type struct lyd_node const* has been added to the calling stack. This parameter will not be initialized by old clients.
2 Parameter snode of type struct lysc_node const* has been added to the calling stack. This parameter will not be initialized by old clients.


tree_data.h, libyang.so.4.2.2
[+] lyd_dup_siblings ( struct lyd_node const* node, struct lyd_node_inner* parent, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** dup )  1 
⇣
lyd_dup_siblings ( struct lyd_node const* node, struct lyd_node* parent, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** dup )
Change Effect
1 Base type of 2nd parameter parent has been changed from struct lyd_node_inner (72 bytes) to struct lyd_node (56 bytes). This parameter may be incorrectly initialized by applications.

[+] lyd_dup_siblings_to_ctx ( struct lyd_node const* node, struct ly_ctx const* trg_ctx, struct lyd_node_inner* parent, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** dup )  1 
⇣
lyd_dup_siblings_to_ctx ( struct lyd_node const* node, struct ly_ctx const* trg_ctx, struct lyd_node* parent, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** dup )
Change Effect
1 Base type of 3rd parameter parent has been changed from struct lyd_node_inner (72 bytes) to struct lyd_node (56 bytes). This parameter may be incorrectly initialized by applications.

[+] lyd_dup_single ( struct lyd_node const* node, struct lyd_node_inner* parent, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** dup )  1 
⇣
lyd_dup_single ( struct lyd_node const* node, struct lyd_node* parent, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** dup )
Change Effect
1 Base type of 2nd parameter parent has been changed from struct lyd_node_inner (72 bytes) to struct lyd_node (56 bytes). This parameter may be incorrectly initialized by applications.

[+] lyd_dup_single_to_ctx ( struct lyd_node const* node, struct ly_ctx const* trg_ctx, struct lyd_node_inner* parent, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** dup )  1 
⇣
lyd_dup_single_to_ctx ( struct lyd_node const* node, struct ly_ctx const* trg_ctx, struct lyd_node* parent, uint32_t options, struct lyd_node** dup )
Change Effect
1 Base type of 3rd parameter parent has been changed from struct lyd_node_inner (72 bytes) to struct lyd_node (56 bytes). This parameter may be incorrectly initialized by applications.


to the top

Problems with Data Types, Low Severity  10 

plugins_exts.h
[+] struct lyplg_ext  2 
Change Effect
1 Size of this type has been changed from 104 bytes to 112 bytes. The fields or parameters of such data type may be incorrectly initialized or accessed by old client applications.
2 Type of field node_xpath has been changed from lyplg_ext_data_node_xpath_clb to lyplg_ext_node_xpath_clb. Replacement of the field data type may indicate a change in the semantic meaning of the field.
[+] affected symbols: 2 (0.5%)

Field 'recs.plugin' in 3rd parameter 'recs' (pointer) is of type 'struct lyplg_ext'.

Return value (pointer) has base type 'struct lyplg_ext'.

Change Effect

Replacement of the base data type may indicate a change in its semantic meaning.
